title: Equipment store ends practice of photocopying driver’s licences as a condition of renting equipment
summary: The complainant alleged that an equipment store did not permit him to pick up rental equipment without making a scanned copy of his driver’s license and taking his photograph. The respondent confirmed the complainant's allegation about their rental policy and indicated it was unwilling to discontinue this practice, as it had suffered sign...
